member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.ApplicationConfiguration
member.summary: Adds Use Cases classes.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.ApplicationConfiguration.AddUseCases(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection)
member.summary: Adds Use Cases to the ServiceCollection.
member.param: Service Collection.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleDto
member.summary: Data Transfer Object (DTO) representing a vehicle. Used to expose vehicle information from the ApplicationCore layer to the API or microservice clients.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleDto.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vehicle Id.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleDto.Model
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vehicle Model.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleDto.Plate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vehicle Plate.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleDto.ManufactureDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the Vehicle Manufacture Date. Only vehicles with a maximum age of 5 years are allowed.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto
member.summary: Data Transfer Object (DTO) to rent or return a vehicle. Contains both the vehicle identifier and the user's DNI.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique rental identifier.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.VehicleId
member.summary: Gets or sets the vehicle being rented.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.Dni
member.summary: Gets or sets the user identifier (DNI) renting the vehicle.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.RentDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the vehicle was rented.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Dtos.VehicleRentalDto.ReturnDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the vehicle was returned. Null by default, indicating the vehicle is still rented.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.Vehicle
member.summary: Represents a vehicle in the fleet. This entity is used internally in the ApplicationCore layer to manage vehicle data.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.Vehicle.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier of the vehicle.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.Vehicle.Model
member.summary: Gets or sets the vehicle model. Example: "Toyota Corolla".

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.Vehicle.Plate
member.summary: Gets or sets the vehicle license plate. Example: "ABC-1234".

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.Vehicle.ManufactureDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the manufacture date of the vehicle. Only vehicles up to 5 years old are allowed in the fleet.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.VehicleRental
member.summary: Represents a rental of a vehicle by a user (DNI).

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.VehicleRental.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique rental identifier.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.VehicleRental.VehicleId
member.summary: Gets or sets the vehicle being rented.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.VehicleRental.Dni
member.summary: Gets or sets the user identifier (DNI) renting the vehicle.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.VehicleRental.RentDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the vehicle was rented.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.VehicleRental.ReturnDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date and time when the vehicle was returned. Null by default, indicating the vehicle is still rented.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.UseCases.IOutputPortNotFound
member.summary: Interface to define the Not Found Output Port.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.UseCases.IOutputPortNotFound.NotFoundHandle(System.String)
member.summary: Informs the resource was not found.
member.param: Text description.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.UseCases.IOutputPortStandard`1
member.summary: Interface to define the Standard Output Port.
member.typeparam: Tyoe of the use case response dto.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.UseCases.IOutputPortStandard`1.StandardHandle(`0)
member.summary: Writes to the Standard Output.
member.param: The Output Port Message.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.UseCases.IUseCase`1
member.summary: Interface for the handler of an use case.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.UseCases.IUseCase`1.Execute(`0)
member.summary: Executes the Use Case.
member.param: Input Message.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.UseCases.IUseCaseInput
member.summary: Input Message interface marker.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.UseCases.IUseCaseOutput
member.summary: Output Message interface marker.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.RentVehicleCommand
member.summary: Command to request renting a vehicle. Contains the identifier of the vehicle to rent and the user's DNI. This command is handled by a MediatR handler that will process the rental and return a representing the created rental.
member.param: The unique identifier of the vehicle to be rented.
The DNI of the user who wants to rent the vehicle.
The Rent Date of the vehicle, if null will be the currentDate.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.RentVehicleCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Command to request renting a vehicle. Contains the identifier of the vehicle to rent and the user's DNI. This command is handled by a MediatR handler that will process the rental and return a representing the created rental.
member.param: The unique identifier of the vehicle to be rented.
The DNI of the user who wants to rent the vehicle.
The Rent Date of the vehicle, if null will be the currentDate.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.RentVehicleCommand.VehicleId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the vehicle to be rented.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.RentVehicleCommand.Dni
member.summary: The DNI of the user who wants to rent the vehicle.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.RentVehicleCommand.RentDate
member.summary: The Rent Date of the vehicle, if null will be the currentDate.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.ReturnVehicleCommand
member.summary: Command to request returning a rented vehicle. Contains the identifier of the vehicle to return and the user's DNI. This command is handled by a MediatR handler that will process the return and return a representing the updated rental.
member.param: The unique identifier of the vehicle being returned.
The DNI of the user who is returning the vehicle.
The Return Date of the vehicle, if null will be the currentDate.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.ReturnVehicleCommand.#ctor(System.Guid,System.String,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Command to request returning a rented vehicle. Contains the identifier of the vehicle to return and the user's DNI. This command is handled by a MediatR handler that will process the return and return a representing the updated rental.
member.param: The unique identifier of the vehicle being returned.
The DNI of the user who is returning the vehicle.
The Return Date of the vehicle, if null will be the currentDate.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.ReturnVehicleCommand.VehicleId
member.summary: The unique identifier of the vehicle being returned.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.ReturnVehicleCommand.Dni
member.summary: The DNI of the user who is returning the vehicle.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.ReturnVehicleCommand.ReturnDate
member.summary: The Return Date of the vehicle, if null will be the currentDate.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.GetAvailableVehiclesHandler
member.summary: Handler responsible for processing the . Retrieves all vehicles that are currently not rented.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.GetAvailableVehiclesHandler.#ctor(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Repositories.IVehicleRepository,GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository)
member.summary: Handler responsible for processing the . Retrieves all vehicles that are currently not rented.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.GetAvailableVehiclesHandler.Handle(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Queries.GetAvailableVehiclesQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles the request and returns a list of representing vehicles available for renting.
member.param: The query request. No additional parameters in this case.
Token to cancel the asynchronous operation if needed.
member.returns: A collection of representing available vehicles.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.RentVehicleHandler
member.summary: Handler responsible for processing . Creates a new rental record in the and returns a representing the rented vehicle.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.RentVehicleHandler.#ctor(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository)
member.summary: Handler responsible for processing . Creates a new rental record in the and returns a representing the rented vehicle.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.RentVehicleHandler.Handle(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.RentVehicleCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles the request. Creates a new rental with the provided VehicleId and DNI, sets the RentDate, stores it in the repository, and returns the corresponding .
member.param: The command containing VehicleId and user DNI.
Token to cancel the operation.
member.returns: A representing the newly created rental.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.ReturnVehicleHandler
member.summary: Handler responsible for processing . Updates an existing rental record in the and returns a representing the rented vehicle.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.ReturnVehicleHandler.#ctor(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository)
member.summary: Handler responsible for processing . Updates an existing rental record in the and returns a representing the rented vehicle.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Handlers.ReturnVehicleHandler.Handle(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Commands.ReturnVehicleCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles the request. Updathes the existing rental with the provided VehicleId and DNI, and sets the ReturnDate, stores it in the repository, and returns the corresponding .
member.param: The command containing VehicleId and user DNI.
Token to cancel the operation.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Queries.GetAvailableVehiclesQuery
member.summary: Query to get all available vehicles in the fleet.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository
member.summary: Repository interface to manage rental vehicles in the fleet. Defines the operations required by the application core to manage vehicle rentals.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository.GetAllRentedVehiclesAsync
member.summary: Gets all rented vehicles.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository.AddAsync(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.VehicleRental)
member.summary: Adds a new vehicle rental to the repository.
member.param: The to add.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository.UpdateAsync(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.VehicleRental)
member.summary: Updates an existing vehicle rental to the repository.
member.param: The to update.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository.HasAnExistingRental(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether there is an existing active rental for the provided identity.
member.param: The identity number (DNI) of the customer to check.
member.returns: A task that resolves to true if there is at least one active rental associated with the given DNI; otherwise false.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.VehicleRental.Repositories.IVehicleRentalRepository.GetRentalByDniAndVehicleId(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific rental by vehicle identifier and customer DNI.
member.param: Unique identifier of the vehicle ().
DNI of the customer associated with the rental.
member.returns: A task that resolves to the if found; otherwise null.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Commands.CreateVehicleCommand
member.summary: Command to create a new vehicle in the fleet. This command is handled by MediatR and returns a after creation.
member.param: Gets or sets the model of the vehicle. Example: "Toyota Corolla".
Gets or sets the license plate of the vehicle. Example: "ABC-1234".
Gets or sets the manufacture date of the vehicle. Only vehicles up to 5 years old are allowed.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Commands.CreateVehicleCommand.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.DateTime)
member.summary: Command to create a new vehicle in the fleet. This command is handled by MediatR and returns a after creation.
member.param: Gets or sets the model of the vehicle. Example: "Toyota Corolla".
Gets or sets the license plate of the vehicle. Example: "ABC-1234".
Gets or sets the manufacture date of the vehicle. Only vehicles up to 5 years old are allowed.

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Commands.CreateVehicleCommand.Model
member.summary: Gets or sets the model of the vehicle. Example: "Toyota Corolla".

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Commands.CreateVehicleCommand.Plate
member.summary: Gets or sets the license plate of the vehicle. Example: "ABC-1234".

member.name: P:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Commands.CreateVehicleCommand.ManufactureDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the manufacture date of the vehicle. Only vehicles up to 5 years old are allowed.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Handlers.CreateVehicleHandler
member.summary: Handles the to create a new vehicle in the fleet. This handler is responsible for validating the command, creating the Vehicle entity, and returning a with the created vehicle's details.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Gets or sets the vehicle repository used to persist vehicles.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Handlers.CreateVehicleHandler.#ctor(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Repositories.IVehicleRepository)
member.summary: Handles the to create a new vehicle in the fleet. This handler is responsible for validating the command, creating the Vehicle entity, and returning a with the created vehicle's details.
member.remarks: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Gets or sets the vehicle repository used to persist vehicles.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Handlers.CreateVehicleHandler.Handle(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Commands.CreateVehicleCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Handles the request.
member.param: Gets or sets the command containing the vehicle data to create.
Gets or sets the cancellation token.
member.returns: A containing the information of the newly created vehicle.
member.exception: Thrown if the vehicle manufacture date is more than 5 years old.

member.name: T:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Repositories.IVehicleRepository
member.summary: Repository interface to manage vehicles in the fleet. Defines the operations required by the application core to manage vehicles.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Repositories.IVehicleRepository.GetByIdAsync(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets a vehicle by its unique identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the vehicle.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Repositories.IVehicleRepository.AddAsync(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.Vehicle)
member.summary: Adds a new vehicle to the repository.
member.param: The to add.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Repositories.IVehicleRepository.UpdateAsync(GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Entities.Vehicle)
member.summary: Updates an existing vehicle in the repository.
member.param: The to update.

member.name: M:GtMotive.Estimate.Microservice.ApplicationCore.Vehicles.Repositories.IVehicleRepository.GetAllAsync
member.summary: Gets all vehicles.
